meta.title: US military aircraft scramble to help combat LA wildfires
meta.description:
Veterans impacted by the LA wildfires can get help by contacting the VA at:
1-800-MyVA411 (1-800-698-2411)

List of LA area shelters open to the pubic: https://news.caloes.ca.gov/shelters-available-for-communities-impacted-by-wildfires-in-southern-california-2/

Ways to help those affected:
https://www.nbclosangeles.com/news/local/how-to-help-those-affected-by-the-wildfires/3598176/

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews

Citations:
https://www.northcom.mil/Newsroom/Press-Releases/Article/4025439/usnorthcom-activates-eight-c-130-aircraft-in-response-to-la-wildfires/
https://www.fs.usda.gov/managing-land/fire/planes/maffs
https://aviationweek.com/defense/multi-mission-aircraft/national-guard-c-130s-joining-fight-against-la-fires
